---
name: Misc feedback
about: Share any of your thoughts on character-sheet
title: Feedback
labels: ''
assignees: sam-holmes2

---

- type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        Thanks for taking the time. Honest feedback — positive or negative — is the most useful thing you can give an early-stage project.
        
        Fill in as much or as little as you like.

 - type: textarea
    id: working
    attributes:
      label: What's working well for you?
      description: Anything you've found genuinely useful, satisfying, or that surprised you in a good way.
  - type: textarea
    id: friction
    attributes:
      label: What's frustrating, confusing, or missing?
      description: No filter needed. If something feels off, is hard to understand, or you keep wishing it did something different — this is the place.
  - type: textarea
    id: usecase
    attributes:
      label: How are you using it?
      description: How often, which tabs you actually use, whether you're using it with an AI or offline — whatever gives context. No right answer.
  - type: dropdown
    id: overall
    attributes:
      label: Overall, how's it landing?
      options:
        - Really enjoying it
        - It has potential but needs work
        - Mixed — some parts good, some not
        - Not quite what I was looking for
        - Too early to say
  - type: textarea
    id: other
    attributes:
      label: Anything else?
      description: Feature ideas, philosophical objections, comparisons to other tools, or anything that didn't fit above.
